meaning: adj.未播种的,不结果实的,(运动员等)非种子的
examples: Venus was the first unseeded woman in history to reach the final round.
The first seed lost to an unseeded player by 2-6 in the first round.
Any unseeded torrents will be deleted on sight regardless of the reason.
Unseeded Williams eased past fellow American Meilen Tu 6-2 7-5 and now meets France's Tatiana Golovin.
And the unseeded outsider took it 7-4 to reach round four for the first time.
